tool.name: EnzyWizard Disorder
tool.description: Predict intrinsically disordered regions from a cleaned protein structure
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Disorder**
Predicts intrinsically disordered regions from a cleaned protein structure using a FoldIndex-like algorithm based on residue hydrophobicity and net charge.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein structure in CIF or PDB format.
**Outputs** - JSON report with disordered region predictions and statistics.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-disorder` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-disorder
